# Stop Normalization Fixtures

These fixtures are synthetic stop-group scenarios for layout-backed RateCon
normalization tests.

Rules:

- no private data;
- no real broker, carrier, customer, or facility names;
- no real MC numbers;
- no real addresses;
- no real dates, times, rates, or references;
- no PDFs or screenshots;
- structure-only stop-group metadata and evidence ids.

The fixtures model raw `StopGroupCandidate` shapes. Expected results describe
safe counts and statuses only.
